response.title: Chief Operations Officer (COO)
response.description: The Chief Operations Officer (COO) will oversee the daily operations of the agency, ensuring that all programs and policies are executed effectively and efficiently. The COO will work closely with the executive team to develop strategic plans, manage resources, and drive operational excellence in alignment with the agency's mission and goals. This role requires strong leadership skills, strategic vision, and a commitment to public service.

requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Administration, Business Administration, or related field
